_comment: If a session is in-progress and you don't know its end date yet, omit `end` (or set it to null). The viewer treats the missing end as 'tracks the latest known event' (state.allTMax) and labels the dropdown / timeline as '(ongoing)' / 'present'. When a session wraps, the Sunday heartbeat workflow auto-closes it at the in-game frontier and appends the next session (tools/roll_session.py); the auto-set end is approximate (max event date, not the save date) — nudge it here or in sessions.html if the end-of-session map says otherwise.
